name: Rate-limited login with lockout
task: Create /tmp/eval_lrl/lrl.py with class LoginRateLimiter(max_failures=5, window=300, lockout_seconds=900). Method allow(user, now) returns False if the user is currently locked out, True otherwise. record_failure(user, now) appends a failure timestamp; after `max_failures` failures within the rolling `window`, lock the user out for `lockout_seconds`. record_success(user) resets failures and lockout for that user.
